title: lathyrus digitatus subsp. tempskyanus
intro: Lathyrus digitatus subsp. tempskyanus, also known as Tempsky's pea or yellow pea, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting the respiratory system. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus digitatus subsp. tempskyanus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
